## Summary

Describe the problem and the change in a few sentences.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Terraform or workflow change
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive`
- [ ] `terraform validate`
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] Other checks run locally if available

## Impact

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking change explained below
- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Security impact explained below
- [ ] No material cost impact
- [ ] Cost impact explained below

## Notes

Call out any of the following if they apply:

- input or output changes
- IAM or IRSA changes
- endpoint exposure changes
- CI credential changes
- rollback considerations
- documentation updates
